title: verbascum × thapsi
intro: Verbascum × thapsi, also known as the Giant Mullein or Mullein, is a hybrid plant species in the Verbascum genus, known for its impressive height and unique foliage. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used in herbal medicine for their anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Verbascum × thapsi include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and promote relaxation, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for insomnia and anxiety. The plant can be prepared in various forms, including teas, infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
